heading: Payments
label: 1194 Payments

children.text: any unpaid claim allowed under ;section 503(b) of this title
any payment made for the purpose of providing adequate protection of an interest in property due to the holder of a secured claim; and
any fee owing to the trustee.

children.heading: .—Other Plans
children.label: b .—Other Plans
children.text: If a plan is confirmed under , except as otherwise provided in the plan or in the order confirming the plan, the trustee shall make payments to creditors under the plan.section 1191(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Payments Prior to Confirmation
children.label: c .—Payments Prior to Confirmation
children.text: Prior to confirmation of a plan, the court, after notice and a hearing, may authorize the trustee to make payments to the holder of a secured claim for the purpose of providing adequate protection of an interest in property.
